landing.title: LingoFlow
landing.subtitle: AI-Powered English Shadowing & Intensive Reading
landing.description: Paste a video link, let AI transcribe it, and start your shadowing practice

login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue

shadow.title: Shadow Practice
shadow.description: Auto-rewind on pause for seamless repetition

annotation.title: Annotations & Explanations
annotation.description: Select text for instant AI vocabulary and grammar insights

dashboard.urlPlaceholder: Paste a YouTube or Bilibili link...
dashboard.localImportHint: Supports .mp4 and .webm. Subtitles can be .srt or .vtt, or uploaded later from the video page.
dashboard.localVideoRequired: Choose a local video file first.
dashboard.localVideoUnsupported: Only .mp4 and .webm video files are supported for now.
dashboard.localSubtitleUnsupported: Only .srt and .vtt subtitle files are supported for now.
dashboard.localSubtitleParseFailed: No valid subtitle cues were found. Check the timestamp format.
dashboard.noVideosHint: Paste a link to add the first video to the shared library
dashboard.importingHint: Fetching subtitles, this may take a few seconds...
dashboard.errorNoSubtitles: No subtitles available for this video. Try another one.
dashboard.errorInvalidUrl: Please enter a valid YouTube or Bilibili link
dashboard.errorSaveFailed: Failed to save video. Please try again.
dashboard.deleteConfirmBody: This will delete "{title}" from the database, including its subtitles, annotations, and dictation records. This cannot be undone.
dashboard.deleteFailed: Failed to delete video. Please try again.

studyRoom.promptCopied: Prompt copied. You can paste the JSON result next.
studyRoom.promptCopiedToast: Prompt copied — paste it into your AI tool
studyRoom.copyPromptFailed: Failed to copy the prompt. Please try again.
studyRoom.noVocabularySelected: No vocabulary selected yet. Bold the target words in the editor first.
studyRoom.reviewSelectionDesc: Confirm the words for this round, then copy the prompt or go straight to the JSON paste step.
studyRoom.pasteJsonDesc: Paste the raw JSON returned by your external AI tool and we will preview it here.
studyRoom.reviewDefinitionsDesc: You can edit lemmas and explanations before saving them to the database.
studyRoom.jsonInvalid: Failed to parse the JSON. Please check the format and fields.
studyRoom.jsonNoMatch: No selected words matched the pasted JSON. Check whether original_text matches your selection.
studyRoom.pasteJsonHintInline: Copy the prompt first, then paste the returned JSON here.
studyRoom.saveSuccess: Saved successfully. The explanations are now visible on the page.
studyRoom.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.
studyRoom.subtitleUploadSuccess: Subtitles saved. You can start studying now.
studyRoom.persistReviewedTranscript: Also save my current dictation content to user_dictations
studyRoom.promptEditorDesc: Choose explanation language and customize the prompt, then copy with one click
studyRoom.instantLookupDesc: Marked "{word}". You can look up all currently selected words without saved definitions, or cancel this annotation.
studyRoom.ccNoWordsSelected: Click words in the transcript panel to select them first
studyRoom.enhancePromptDesc: Copy the prompt to your AI tool to get enhanced subtitle segments
studyRoom.enhancePasteDesc: Paste the raw JSON array returned by your AI tool
studyRoom.enhanceJsonInvalid: Invalid JSON. Expected array of objects with start_time, end_time, and text
studyRoom.enhanceSaveSuccess: Subtitles enhanced and saved. Page updated.
studyRoom.enhanceSourceRawHint: Start fresh from {count} raw YouTube subtitles

transcript.title: Transcript
transcript.noSubtitlesDesc: No subtitles or transcript found for this video
transcript.wordClickHint: Click words to add them to your vocabulary list
transcript.suppressInstantLookup: Do not show lookup dialog after selecting
transcript.clearSelectionConfirmBody: This will remove {count} selected words from the current selection.
transcript.uploadDesc: No usable CC subtitles were found for this video. Upload a local SRT or VTT subtitle file to continue with the existing study tools.
transcript.uploadUnsupported: Only .srt and .vtt subtitle files are supported for now.
transcript.uploadParseFailed: No valid subtitle cues were found. Check the timestamp format.
transcript.uploadFailed: Failed to save subtitles. Please try again.
